name: host
description: Host orchestration agent for Intera Inventory that delegates domain work to specialist agents and formats safe frontend responses.

skills.name: Agent Orchestration
skills.description: Route tenant-scoped requests to specialist agents, then shape the returned data into frontend-friendly interaction flows.
examples: Delegate a product search request to the product agent.
Turn delegated results into a searchable selection flow.
Prepare a structured confirmation flow before a delegated delete action.
